sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93283" key="sapwnariko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σᾱπων-αρικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n93283.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">saponaceous, soapy</tr_>, Zos.Alch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.226B.</biblScope></bibl>, Paul. Aeg.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.9</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-αρικὴ τέχνη</foreign> art <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of making soap</tr_>, Zos.Alch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.142B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
